zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir. John Fenne於1520年出生時，他的父親Simon Fenn26歲，母親Alice Aldington24歲。他於1551年與Jane Elizabeth Swayne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1596年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Fenne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fenn
meanings: English: topographic name in south-east England for someone who lived in a low-lying marshy area, from Middle English fen(ne) ‘fen, marsh’ (Old English fenn).
South German: topographic name from Old High German fenni, Middle Low German and Old Frisian fenne ‘bog’. Compare Fehn .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 馮, see   Feng   1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir. John Fenne was born in 1520, his father, Simon Fenn, was 26 and his mother, Alice Aldington, was 24. He married Jane Elizabeth Swayne in 1551. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1596, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir. John Fenne(이)가 1520년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Fenn(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Aldington(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1551년 Jane Elizabeth Swayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1596년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir. John Fenne родился в 1520 г., его отцу по имени Simon Fenn было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Aldington, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Elizabeth Swayne в 1551 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1596 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
